areas.desc: You are inside of the main castle hall.
You're in the throne room. The king wants to speak with you.
you leave the castle, you feel something watching you

You should be grateful I even let you stand in my presence. If I were in a worse mood, my servents would be scrubbing you off floor instead of pretending to matter because i can see how usless you are, I can see everything, I AM THE KING.
